title: Our capabilities
description: Six core service lines. One accountable team. From first feasibility to final handover.

hero.title:
End-to-end delivery
across every asset class.
hero.lede: Six core service lines. One accountable team. From first feasibility to final handover.

sections.title: Office towers, retail & business parks
sections.lede: Large-scale office towers, mixed-use business parks and flagship retail destinations. We deliver every major component in-house — structure, envelope, fit-out — giving owners single-point accountability and tighter cost control than any multi-subcontract model.

sections.title: Luxury homes, apartments & communities
sections.lede: From signature single-family villas to high-rise apartment towers and master-planned residential communities. Our dedicated residential division brings construction finance structuring, design coordination and sales-phasing expertise together under one roof.

sections.title: Factories, warehouses & logistics centres
sections.lede: Greenfield and brownfield industrial facilities — automotive plants, pharmaceutical manufacturing, e-commerce fulfilment centres and cold-chain logistics hubs. Engineered for maximum throughput, energy efficiency and future adaptability.

sections.title: Roads, bridges, rail & utilities
sections.lede: Civil infrastructure at scale — from urban road networks and cable-stayed bridges to rail viaducts, water treatment plants and power transmission corridors. We have delivered over $8B in infrastructure value across four continents.

sections.title: Modernisation of complex live environments
sections.lede: Structural upgrades, seismic retrofits, interior renovations and full strip-out-and-rebuild programmes — often while buildings remain occupied. Our live-environment protocols protect tenants, meet OSHA requirements and keep schedules intact.

sections.title: One contract. One point of accountability.
sections.lede: Integrated design-and-build delivery means architects, engineers and contractors work from a single brief under a single contract. Faster decisions, no scope gaps, and a GMP price established earlier in the project lifecycle.
